message:
Refactor dispatch to use BackendRegistry with device-aware fallback

Replace the hardcoded resolve_backend helper with BackendRegistry's
resolve_with_fallback, which provides structured device placement and
graceful fallback when the requested backend is unavailable. Thread
DeviceId through execute_with_transforms, execute_grad, execute_vmap,
and execute_grad_finite_diff so the resolved device is used consistently.

Add tests verifying unknown backends fall back to CPU execution and that
the requested backend name remains part of the cache key even after
fallback.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
